# programs.codex

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.codex`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.codex.context` | | |
| `programs.codex.custom-instructions` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Define custom guidance for the agents; this value is written to {file}~/.codex/AGENTS.md |
| `programs.codex.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal. |
| `programs.codex.enableMcpIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to integrate the MCP server config from programs.mcp.servers into programs.codex.settings.mcp_servers . |
| `programs.codex.package` | `null or package` | The codex package to use. |
| `programs.codex.rules` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with “\n” or absolute path)` | Codex rules files to manage under CODEX_HOME/rules/ . |
| `programs.codex.settings` | `null or TOML value` | Configuration written to CODEX_HOME/config.toml (0.2.0+) or ~/.codex/config.yaml (\<0.2.0). Per default CODEX_HOME defaults to ~/.codex. See https://github.com/openai/codex/blob/main/codex-rs/config.md for supported values. |
| `programs.codex.skills` | `(attribute set of (strings concatenated with “\n” or absolute path)) or absolute path` | Custom skills for Codex. |
